title: Russian GRU Launches Disinformation Campaign Targeting Ukraine Aid
summary: Russian intelligence service deploys fake accounts to undermine Western support for Ukraine. Campaign spreads false narratives about aid corruption. Twitter analysts expose operation's tactics and reach.
contents:
## Russian GRU Launches Disinformation Campaign Targeting Ukraine Aid

### Overview
Russian intelligence service deploys fake accounts to undermine Western support for Ukraine. Campaign spreads false narratives about aid corruption. Twitter analysts expose operation's tactics and reach.

### Event Details
Twitter account @SchizointReL reports Russian GRU Unit 29155 conducts sophisticated disinformation campaign against Ukraine aid efforts. Operators create hundreds of fake profiles mimicking Western journalists and politicians. These accounts flood platforms with fabricated stories claiming Ukrainian officials embezzle billions in U.S. and EU funds. Campaign peaks during recent NATO summit discussions on increased military support. @SchizointReL shares screenshots of coordinated posting patterns, timestamp analysis, and linguistic markers linking posts to known GRU clusters. Influence operation targets swing-state voters in U.S. ahead of elections, aiming to erode public backing for $61 billion aid package. Researchers track amplification through bot networks and compromised influencers, reaching millions of impressions. Ukrainian cyber defense teams confirm similar tactics in prior operations like NotPetya. @SchizointReL highlights multilingual content in English, German, and French to maximize European impact. Platform moderators remove thousands of accounts, but new ones emerge rapidly. Analysts urge governments to counter with fact-checking initiatives and enhanced platform transparency. Operation demonstrates GRU's evolution in hybrid warfare, blending cyber tools with psychological influence. Evidence includes IP traces to Moscow-based VPNs and reused graphics from previous campaigns. @SchizointReL continues monitoring for escalations tied to frontline developments.

### Source Context
@SchizointReL (SchizointReL) covers this category of developments. The account focuses on information operation disinformation cyber influence campaign intelligence service.
